summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 UI improvements: 1) 3-step onboarding flow (Disclaimer→Auth→Profile), 2) Pregnancy stages format 'First Trimester (Weeks 1-12)', 3) Sign Up/Sign In toggle with email/password validation, 4) Back button in header on non-home pages. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Step 1: Disclaimer step visible on onboarding
Step 2: Auth step visible with Sign Up/Sign In toggle
Sign In mode shows 'Welcome Back' text
Sign Up mode shows 'Create Your Account' text
Email validation: Empty email error shown
Email validation: Invalid email format error shown
Password validation: Empty password error shown
Password validation: Short password (< 6 chars) error shown
Step 3: Profile step visible after auth
Pregnancy stage format: 'First Trimester (Weeks 1-12)' - CORRECT
Pregnancy stage format: 'Second Trimester (Weeks 13-26)' - CORRECT
Pregnancy stage format: 'Third Trimester (Weeks 27-40)' - CORRECT
Pregnancy stage format: 'Postpartum (After delivery)' - CORRECT
Gluten-Free diet option present in dietary considerations
User ID generated with format user_{timestamp}_{random9chars}
Email stored correctly in user data
Back button NOT present on home page - CORRECT
Back button visible on Settings page - CORRECT
Back button visible on About page - CORRECT
Back button visible on Food Detail page - CORRECT
Back button navigation works correctly (navigates back in history)
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingPage.jsx correctly implements 3-step flow with totalSteps=3
pregnancyStages array at lines 25-30 has correct format 'First Trimester (Weeks 1-12)'
Email validation regex /\S+@\S+\.\S+/ is basic but functional
Layout.jsx Header component shows back button when location.pathname !== '/'
Auth is localStorage-based (MOCKED - no backend auth API)
test_credentials: No credentials needed - localStorage-based user management
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI improvements verified: 1) Onboarding has 3 steps - Disclaimer (step 1), Auth with Sign Up/Sign In toggle (step 2), Profile with age/pregnancy stage/dietary (step 3). 2) Pregnancy stages display as 'First Trimester (Weeks 1-12)' format. 3) Auth stores email in localStorage but is MOCKED (no backend auth API). 4) Back button in header shows on all pages except home (location.pathname !== '/'). 5) Gluten-Free exists at line 10 of dietaryOptions array.

features_verified.auth_toggle: WORKING - Sign Up/Sign In toggle switches UI correctly
features_verified.back_button_home: WORKING - NOT visible on home page
features_verified.back_button_other_pages: WORKING - Visible on Settings, About, Food Detail pages
features_verified.back_button_navigation: WORKING - Uses navigate(-1) for browser history

mocked_api_note: Auth is localStorage-based only - no backend authentication API. User data stored in localStorage with key 'whattoeat_user'.
